name: knudg
description: Self-hostable agent experience infrastructure for reusable solved paths, failed paths, and environment traps.

scripts.test: node scripts/run-python.js -m pytest tests/test_knudg_closed_api.py tests/test_knudg_live_agent.py tests/test_task_profile_schema.py tests/test_knudg_client_config.py
scripts.rollback:lp: npx --yes wrangler@4.90.0 rollback --name knudg-site --message "Rollback LP deploy" --yes
scripts.domain:policies: node scripts/run-python.js -m pytest tests/test_domain_policy_registry.py tests/test_task_profile_schema.py tests/test_knudg_task_profile_builder.py
scripts.future-surface:leaks: node scripts/run-python.js -m pytest tests/test_intake_safety_gate.py tests/test_trust_and_safety_audit.py tests/test_experience_surface_gates.py tests/test_experience_surface_activation.py tests/test_experience_storage_record.py tests/test_redacted_experience_storage_migration.py tests/test_public_exposure_contract.py tests/test_public_candidate_conversion.py tests/test_b2b_respondent_portal.py tests/test_abuse_identity_enforcement.py tests/test_raw_detail_escrow.py tests/test_company_store_dashboard.py tests/test_candidate_payload_facets.py tests/test_abuse_identity_lane_schema.py
scripts.gates:all: npm run wedge:evidence -- validate --input fixtures/wedge-evidence.sample.json && npm run m3:gates && npm run review:gates && npm run circuit:gates && npm run runbook:manifest && npm run launch:gates && npm run intake:gates && npm run auth:gates && npm run consent:gates && npm run tns:audit && npm run experience:surfaces && npm run experience:activation && npm run experience:storage && npm run public:exposure && npm run public:candidate-conversion && npm run b2b:respondent-portal && npm run abuse:identity && npm run abuse:identity-enforcement && npm run raw:detail-escrow && npm run dashboard:company-store && npm run domain:policies && npm run domain:lookup && npm run candidate:facets && npm run future-surface:leaks
